data.content: Implementation review approved. Changes in knots-backend.ts and beads-backend.ts add includeDescendantsOfQueueParents to phase-filtered views (queued/in_action), correctly walking parent chains recursively with memoization to include all descendants of queue-state parents regardless of child state. Tests cover: basic parent-child inclusion, deep nesting, in_action filter, and specific-state-filter exclusion. All quality gates pass: 2068 tests green, typecheck clean, lint 0 errors. Minor note: the helper is duplicated across both backends but this is acceptable given the separate data models.
